name: M:GTA.Math.Matrix.RotationYawPitchRoll(System.Single,System.Single,System.Single)
summary: Creates a rotation matrix with a specified yaw, pitch, and roll.

params.name: yaw
params.description: Yaw around the y-axis, in radians.

params.name: pitch
params.description: Pitch around the x-axis, in radians.

params.name: roll
params.description: Roll around the z-axis, in radians.
